description_long: This is a large, upright outdoor trash bin with a rectangular body and a flat, hinged lid in a tan color. The main body is gray and features a prominent recycling symbol and the words 'RESTO DE RESIDUOS' on the front, indicating it is designated for residual waste. The bin is equipped with two sturdy black wheels at the rear base, allowing for easy mobility. The lid has molded grip areas and a metal handle for lifting, as well as a slot for inserting waste. The overall construction appears to be robust, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or residential areas. The surface is smooth and hard, typical of high-density plastic bins used for municipal waste collection.
description: A large gray trash bin with a tan flat lid, recycling signage, and two black wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recycling symbol, 'RESTO DE RESIDUOS' label, and the full width of the tan lid.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the bin, the side profile of the lid, and one visible wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both black wheels and the back panel of the bin, with no signage visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the lid, the handle, and one wheel.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Recycling symbol and 'RESTO DE RESIDUOS' label on the front
